---
title: "Evelyn Matilda Hildyard"
---

## Evelyn Matilda Hildyard

**Dates:** (b. 1851/2)

### Description

member of the Gosling Society

### Biography

A Gosling as ‘Hazel-nut’, she was daughter of the Rev. James Hildyard, Rector of Ingoldsby, and Eliza Kinderley [LG 1952, 1965 Hildyard]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
